articles.title: Man pleads guilty to battery, voyeurism after targeting child in grocery store restroom
articles.description: Bradley Austin Moyer of Port Carbon, Pennsylvania. Mugshot courtesy Charlestown Police Department. LOUISVILLE, Ky. (WDRB) -- A Pennsylvania man has pleaded guilty after authorities said a disturbing incident at a Southern Indiana grocery store escalated into multiple felony charges, according to court records. Bradley Moyer pleaded guilty to battery, voyeurism and auto theft. Court documents said the incident happened in October of last year at a Jay C Food Store in Charlestown. Investigators said Moyer inappropriately touched a 7-year-old girl inside a women's restroom and pulled off her shoe. Police also alleged he used a phone in an attempt to record under a bathroom stall. According to authorities, the child's mother confronted Moyer inside the store. He then fled the scene, getting into a vehicle and driving away. Police say a bystander who tried to intervene was struck during the confrontation. Moyer is scheduled to be sentenced July 22.

articles.title: Florida man allegedly recorded girls in church bathroom with hidden camera, arrested on voyeurism charges
articles.description: Charles Barton Lucas was released on $25,000 bond after IT staff at his employer discovered the videos NEWYou can now listen to Fox News articles! An "overseer" at a church was arrested on video voyeurism charges after images from the church's bathroom and another area were found on the suspect's work laptop, according to the Lake County Sheriff's Office. Authorities arrested 59-year-old Charles Barton Lucas on Friday after the IT director at RoMac Building Supply contacted the Leesburg after finding a Google Drive folder full of inappropriate images of adolescent girls and adult women. A statement from RoMac confirmed that Lucas was no longer employed at the company following the incident. "The material was discovered by our team during a routine company process and was immediately reported to law enforcement. We have cooperated fully with the authorities from the outset and will continue to do so. Mr. Lucas is no longer employed by RoMac," the statement read in part. A spokesperson for the Lake County Sheriff's Office said in a statement that investigators found more videos of what appeared to be adolescent girls changing inside a church bathroom. Further investigation determined that the videos came from a hidden camera installed in one of the church's changing rooms and bathrooms. The were no longer present when the Lake County Sheriff's Office went back to inspect the bathroom. Lucas was arrested on Friday evening and taken to Lake County Jail, but was released on a $25,000 bond on Saturday afternoon, according to the sheriff's office. An arrest affidavit from the sheriff's office said Lucas was listed as an "Overseer" at Fruitland Park's Heritage Community Church. The church released a statement saying that they were "praying for [Lucas] and his family" amid the investigation, but later issued a follow-up statement highlighting their concerns for those impacted. "Our primary concern is for any individuals or families who may have been impacted by these allegations. We recognize the seriousness of situations like this and the deep hurt, confusion, and pain they can cause," the church said in part of a statement to "Heritage Community Church does not condone conduct that harms others or is inconsistent with our biblical values. We are fully cooperating with law enforcement and any other appropriate authorities and will continue to do so throughout this process. While we await additional information, Heritage Community Church is committed to being open, honest, and transparent with our church family regarding information that we are able to share" the statement continued. The investigation remains ongoing and Fox News Digital has reached out to the Lake County Sheriff's Office for further comment. Tessa Hoyos is a Production Assistant for Fox News Digital on the AM Breaking and Trending news team. She joined Fox News Radio in 2024, covering the 2024 election, international affairs, entertainment and business. Tessa graduated from Western Washington University with degrees in communications and acting, and was a DJ and newsreader at the school's radio station. You can reach her at

articles.title: Heath duo accused of using public bathroom camera to make child porn
articles.description: Columbus man who ran a red light and T-boned an SUV at Sunbury and Morse was later fatally struck; police probe. * A Heath man and woman face charges after police allege they made child pornography. * Police accuse the pair of placing a hidden camera inside a public bathroom in Newark. * Authorities discovered the videos on a laptop and other devices on June 24. A Heath man and woman face criminal charges after prosecutors allege in court documents they were creating child pornography when they put a camera inside a public bathroom in Newark. Brianna N. Nethers, 23, and John M. Nethers, 43, each face one count of pandering sexual material involving a minor, Licking County Common Pleas Court records show. In a criminal complaint, police allege Brianna Nethers put a hidden camera from her purse inside a public bathroom in Newark before bringing a minor to that area to engage in sexual activity. Police allege that John Nethers then uploaded the video to his laptop. Police allege another video shows Brianna Nethers putting the camera on a hidden purse in a public restroom in Licking County, though the complaint doesn't state in which municipality. In the video, several people use the bathroom, including minors, police allege in the complaint Newark police found several devices June 24, including John Nethers' laptop on which they allege they found files containing the videos, according to the complaint. Deputies arrested both of them June 24, and they each had bond hearings June 25, court records show.
articles.stallplusAngle: Hidden camera stories raise restroom privacy expectations. "Heath duo accused of using public bathroom camera to make child porn" supports additional sightline protection messaging without claiming surveillance detection or guaranteed prevention.

pendingReview.description: Security technology has evolved dramatically over the past decade or so, and it is fair to say that today's hidden cameras are much smaller, much smarter, and much more capable than they have ever been before. Whether you are looking to monitor your home while you're away, keep an eye on family caregivers, protect your business, or gather evidence that suspicious activity is going on around you, modern spy cameras are a discreet and affordable way of carrying out surveillance without drawing any attention to the fact that you are doing so. The problem is that not all spy cameras are created equal, and some of them are much better at what they do than others. Some have poor or no instructions, while others give you all the guidance you need. Then there are warranties, tech support, and product quality to consider, too, which is why we've put together a selection of 8 of the best spy camera solutions for home, family, and business below, so you can always choose the best camera for your needs. 1. A Wi-Fi-enabled model? A motion-activated recorder? A hidden camera disguised as a household object? For many buyers, the options can feel overwhelming. That's where Best Spy Cameras stands apart. Backed by nearly two decades of experience through The Home Security Superstore, the company has helped thousands of customers select discreet surveillance equipment for homes, families, and workplaces. Rather than functioning as a simple online retailer, Best Spy Cameras combines product selection with expert guidance. Customers have access to knowledgeable support staff who can help identify the most appropriate solution based on: * Monitoring goals * Installation environment * Recording requirements * Budget considerations * Technical preferences This level of assistance can be especially valuable for first-time buyers who may not fully understand the differences between various camera technologies. Not only that, but the platform offers a wide range of hidden surveillance products, including: * Clock cameras * USB charger cameras * Smoke detector cameras * Wi-Fi spy cameras * Motion-activated cameras * Wearable cameras * Vehicle surveillance cameras * Audio and video recording devices This variety allows customers to choose solutions tailored to specific situations rather than settling for a one-size-fits-all approach. They also have strong customer protection policies, which means that if anything goes wrong, you do not have to worry, so they are great for just about anyone who is seeking reliable spy camera technology right now. 2. BrickHouse Security Best for professional surveillance equipment BrickHouse Security is a respected name in the world of surveillance technology and with good reason: the company offers a wide selection of products that are also excellent quality for the price point they are being sold at. Products they sell include: * Hidden cameras * GPS trackers * Counter-surveillance equipment * Security systems Its extensive catalog makes it an appealing choice for both consumers and professional investigators who are looking to add a few more tools to their arsenal. 3. The company offers straightforward product descriptions, educational resources, and customer support designed to help buyers navigate unfamiliar technology. Its approachable style makes it particularly appealing for first-time surveillance customers. 4. Spy Associates Best for covert recording solutions Spy Associates are another company that offers a wide selection of products that can be used for covert surveillance. Popular categories they can provide you with include: * Hidden cameras * Body-worn recorders * Vehicle surveillance systems * Specialty recording devices The retailer is one that caters to both personal and professional security applications, so whether you are looking for a small spy camera to keep an eye on the many at home or you're a professional investigator looking for new surveillance equipment, they have you covered. 5. SPY Centre Security Best for advanced surveillance technology SPY Centre Security specialises in higher-end surveillance equipment and investigative tools. The company's catalogue often includes more sophisticated recording and monitoring solutions than those found through mainstream retailers. This makes it attractive to users seeking advanced functionality, who do not need basic products or having their hand held do much. 6. The Spy Store Best for workplace security monitoring The Spy Store has built a solid relationship with customers due to its reputation for creating functional and long-lasting products that are ideal for business and personal use. Its surveillance offerings include: * Hidden cameras * Employee monitoring systems * Asset protection tools * Personal security products Businesses that are looking to improve their workplace security often don't think that this company is a good choice due to the nature nd quality of their camera products. 7. Lawmate Technology Best for innovative hidden camera design LawMate has long been recognised for producing innovative covert recording devices. The company manufactures many of its own products and is known for integrating cameras into everyday objects while maintaining high recording quality. Its products are frequently used by investigators and security professionals. 8. KJB Security Products Best for specialised investigative equipment KJB Security Products offers a wide selection of surveillance and investigative technologies, including: * Hidden cameras * Audio recorders * GPS tracking devices * Counter-surveillance equipment The company can be used by both private customers and professional users, and it offers just about everything you could ever need to carry out surveillance and keep your home security up to date, so it is a great choice for people who are looking to buy a lot of different technologies that will work in harmony together. Choosing a spy camera company As you can see, there are a lot of excellent spy camera solutions available for home, family, and business, and that means that, whatever you need equipment for, you should be able to find it amongst the eight companies we have highlighted here, whether you go with our number one pick, Best Spy Cameras, or another company we have highlighted.
